title: Vanish
summary: Vanish is a private trading product on Solana designed to keep execution shielded while maintaining auditable fund flows and sanctions screening. Arcium currently lists Vanish as a verified project coming to mainnet, but public docs do not yet spell out Arcium's exact role.
description:
Vanish focuses on private trading with compliance guardrails. Its docs describe a same-wallet-in, same-wallet-out model, sanctions and exposure screening across 90+ blockchains, and reward and referral systems built around shielded trading activity rather than anonymous deposits and withdrawals.

Arcium's mainnet page lists Vanish as a verified project coming to the network and describes it as instant private trading with compliance on Solana. That is strong enough to include it as ecosystem coverage, but I did not find a current Vanish source naming Arcium or documenting an explicit Arcium-powered component.

bodySections.title: Compliance_Model
bodySections.body: Vanish is notable because it tries to combine shielded trading with explicit compliance controls instead of treating those goals as opposites. The docs describe fixed deposit and withdrawal addresses, no address hopping, sanctions and exposure monitoring, and same-wallet-in, same-wallet-out fund flow visibility.

bodySections.title: Arcium_Relevance
bodySections.body: Arcium's mainnet page lists Vanish as a verified project coming to the network and summarizes the product as instant private trading with compliance on Solana. That is enough for ecosystem status. It is not enough to claim a confirmed Arcium integration until Vanish publishes a more direct technical explanation.

statusNote: Arcium's mainnet page lists Vanish as a verified project coming to the network. Vanish's own docs clearly document private trading and compliance controls, but I did not find a current public doc that names Arcium directly.
